title: Data Loss During Form Filling
description: Risk that question responses are lost due to network failure, session timeout, or backend error during form filling, potentially requiring the patient to re-enter data or losing completed responses entirely. This could lead to patient frustration, loss of clinical data, or incorrect medical decisions based on incomplete information.

changeHistory.newValue: A patient loses completed question responses due to network failure or session timeout during form filling, requiring re-entry of clinical data or resulting in incomplete submissions. This could lead to delayed treatment decisions based on incomplete patient information.

hazardousSituation: A patient loses completed question responses due to network failure or session timeout during form filling, requiring re-entry of clinical data or resulting in incomplete submissions. This could lead to delayed treatment decisions based on incomplete patient information.
